title: NexusRAG: Local Hybrid Retrieval and Faithfulness Evaluation for Scientific Papers
description: A fully local RAG system that fuses dense (BGE-small) and sparse (BM25) retrieval with reciprocal-rank fusion and a confidence-gated corrective re-retrieval, shipped with a reproducible CPU-only benchmark on SciFact and NFCorpus (nDCG@10, Recall@20 with bootstrap CIs and paired randomization tests) and a faithfulness evaluation framed as evidence detection (ROC-AUC, PR-AUC).
